item.name: Astrope Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone discernible only by Astrope.

mount.name: Astrope
mount.action: Summon forth Astrope. A fully grown pegasus large enough to bear you and a companion across gentle skies.
mount.description: The emergent studies of winged horses had to be rewritten with a single sighting of Astrope, confirming that adult pegasi are not only enormous in size, but also possessed of a horn. Wary of most, Astrope only allows those of gentle heart to climb upon its back─a back large enough to seat two!
mount.tooltip:
Spread our wings and
soar, we shall!
- Sezul Totoloc

obj.n: I Hope Mentor Will Notice Me VI
